name: Scott P Shields
background: Self-described 'Blue Dog Candidate' and 'The Crypto Governor'. Has conducted writing assessments since 1983, consulting across sectors, and spoke at embassies in 2024. Describes himself as 'just the man in the phone booth' relying on expert guidance.

positions.economy: Strongly pro-capitalist; argues capitalism 'lifted humanity out of the dirt'; opposes socialism/communism; supports economic freedom and individual independence from government
positions.technology: Supports California Crypto Commission; cryptocurrency as a means of decentralizing power
positions.foreignPolicy: Isolate U.S. from nations aligned with Marxist ideology, particularly China
positions.government: Anti-'Atheist Marxism'; 'DeMarxification' of California; defend American founding ideals
